I don't know this city. Can you tell me where it is located?
response: Dhaka is the capital and largest city of Bangladesh. It is located in the central part of the country along the Buriganga River.

prompt:
I met a friend yesterday. He mentioned that Atlanta and Chittagong are the most beautiful cities he has ever seen.
I don't know this city. Can you tell me where it is located?
response: Chittagong is located in southeastern Bangladesh, on the banks of the Karnaphuli River, near the coast of the Bay of Bengal.

prompt:

response: Khulna is located in the southwestern part of Bangladesh. It is the third-largest city in the country and is situated on the banks of the Rupsa and AI-Madhumati rivers.
